location.desc: Used to fetch daily prayer times from the Aladhan API.

city.label: City
city.desc: Enter your city name in English.

country.label: Country
country.desc: Enter your country name or 2-letter code (e.g. UK, US, DZ).

method.label: Calculation Method
method.desc: Determines how prayer times are calculated. Choose the authority followed in your region.

fajrAngle.label: Fajr Angle
fajrAngle.desc: The angle of the sun below the horizon at which Fajr prayer time begins.

ishaAngle.label: Isha Angle
ishaAngle.desc: The angle of the sun below the horizon at which Isha prayer time begins.

showCountdown.label: Show countdown
showCountdown.desc: Show a live countdown to the next prayer in the bar instead of the static time.

notifications.desc: Show a notification when each prayer time begins.

azan.desc: Play azan audio when a prayer time begins.

playAzan.label: Play Azan
playAzan.desc: Play the azan when each prayer time begins.

calibration.desc: Adjust the displayed Hijri date if it does not match your local moon sighting.

hijriDayOffset.label: Hijri Day Adjustment
hijriDayOffset.desc: Shift the displayed Hijri day if the API date does not match your local moon sighting.

school.label: Asr Calculation School
school.desc: Shafi/Maliki/Hanbali uses shadow factor 1. Hanafi uses shadow factor 2, giving a later Asr time.

weekStartDay.label: First day of week
weekStartDay.desc: Choose which day starts the calendar week.

methodCustom.label: Custom Method ID
methodCustom.desc: Enter the numeric method ID from the Aladhan API (e.g. 19 for Algeria / MESRS).

tune.desc: Minute adjustments applied per prayer (negative = earlier, positive = later).

showElapsed.label: Show elapsed time after prayer
showElapsed.desc: After a prayer begins, count up (+) for up to 1 hour. Capped at the time remaining to the next prayer. Replaces the countdown during that window.

hidePrayerName.label: Hide prayer name in bar
hidePrayerName.desc: Show only the time or countdown in the bar widget, without the prayer name label.

widgetIcon.label: Default bar icon
widgetIcon.desc: Default icon to be used by the widget

dynamicIcon.label: Dynamic prayer icon
dynamicIcon.desc: Use next/previous prayer in the bar widget

textColor.label: Bar text color
textColor.desc: Color used for text in the bar widget

iconColor.label: Bar icon color
iconColor.desc: Color used for the icon in the bar widget

activeColor.label: Active Color
activeColor.desc: Color used when prayer is Now or Elapsed

error.network: Network request failed. Check your internet connection.
